name: Heavenly Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a pan over low heat.
2. Add chocolate squares and allow them to melt.
3. Incorporate sugar gradually, stirring after each addition.
4. Slowly stir in the evaporated milk.
5. Heat until warm, then remove from heat. The sauce will thicken as it cools.
6. Serve cool over ice cream or cake. Makes about 1 quart.
